comment: Stayed here the night before the Mercedes-Benz Marathon half. Quiet, walkable to the start line, easy 5 AM out the door.
Booked this for the family the weekend we visited Mom in Woodlawn. Clean, comfortable, and plenty of room for everyone.
Perfect base for the Crestwood Cross Country Invitational weekend. Hosts left a note with parking tips for Oak Mountain.
Drove Devon up for his D1 visit and crashed here overnight. Spotless kitchen, fast wifi, great water pressure after a long drive.
Great spot for the Iron City charity 5K weekend. Close to everything, hosts were responsive and check-in was a breeze.
Solid value near Five Points. We grabbed BBQ down the street and walked back. Would book again for race weekend.
Stayed two nights for Thanksgiving at Mom's so we weren't all crowded in one house. Comfortable beds, warm and cozy.
Nice quiet block in Homewood, ten minutes from the clinic. Loved being able to run the neighborhood loop in the morning.
Booked this for the men's choir retreat weekend. Clean, simple, and the host was flexible on a late check-in.
Good budget pick. Came up for a track clinic and just needed a bed and a shower — this did the job perfectly.
Brought the family for Christmas weekend. Plenty of space, the kitchen had everything we needed for Sunday dinner leftovers.
Wonderful little cottage. Used it the weekend of the season opener. Walkable, quiet, and the host was a real pro.
Stayed here for the marathon expo weekend. Easy parking, comfortable bed, and a great spot to carb-load the night before.
Booked for a long-run weekend with a couple of coaches. Close to the trails and the host had towels and water ready.
Clean and well kept. We came up for the MLK commemoration downtown and this was a short ride from everything.
Great host communication start to finish. We used it for a family birthday weekend and it was perfect for the group.
Stayed before the cardiac screening at UAB. Quiet, close to the medical district, and an easy early morning.
Simple, affordable, exactly as pictured. Good for a quick overnight when I drove athletes back from an away meet.
Roomy house, great for a family holiday gathering. Hosts were warm and left a few snacks for the kids.
Booked this for New Year's weekend near Mom's. Comfortable, clean, and worth every dollar for the space.
